subject: AGI Brooklyn Project
body:
Hi Jeffrey,

Curious if you have further thoughts/plans to follow up on the various
things we discussed?

As you may suspect I remain eager to move forward on working together
to accelerate progress toward a human-obsoleting thinking machine ;-)

I'm in Asia thru June 13 but will be home for the second half of June...

I hope your legal situation is resolving itself suitably, etc. etc.

Ben

-- 
Ben Goertzel, PhD
CEO, Novamente LLC and Biomind LLC
Director of Research, SIAI
ben@goertzel.org

"If men cease to believe that they will one day become gods then they
will surely become worms."
-- Henry Miller
